_comment: Replaces the existing minimal SoftwareApplication block on the homepage. Resolves F9. Fields marked TBD must be confirmed by operator before publishing — do NOT publish synthetic aggregateRating data.
name: CostSage
description: Agentic AI system for FinOps that reasons across AWS and Azure, plans cost optimisations, and executes them autonomously after human approval. Average customer reduces cloud spend by 35%.
featureList: AI rightsizing for EC2, RDS, and Azure VMs
Idle resource detection and scheduled shutdown
Reserved Instance and Savings Plan optimisation
Autonomous execution after one human approval
Read-only IAM / Azure RBAC connection in 60 seconds
Multi-account AWS Organization and Azure Tenant support
Audit ledger of every agent action
softwareRequirements: Modern web browser; AWS account with IAM permission to create roles, and/or Azure account with subscription owner permission to assign Reader RBAC role.

audience.audienceType: FinOps engineers, DevOps leads, CTOs, VP Engineering, cloud cost owners

_aggregateRating_TBD._comment: Add ONLY when ≥10 verified reviews exist on a third-party site (G2, Capterra) or first-party with attribution. Do not synthesize.
